description: An expressionist landscape painting showing a sun-drenched scene with a yellow building, a palm tree at center, a dark streetlamp post to the right, and green vegetation. The brushwork is bold and loose with thick impasto in vivid yellows, greens, reds, and dark tones. The style is energetic and spontaneous, capturing the bright light and warmth of a Mediterranean coastal setting. A signature is visible in the lower left.
